source: NvChad - NvChad UI: NvChad Interface: the built-in help commands and opening NvimTree

options: shows a legend of associated commands
questions.why: Space alone pops up the command legend.

questions.q: Which command lists all commands included in the editor?
questions.why: <leader>wK shows all commands (press d for the rest).

questions.q: How do you view all of Neovim's options as a category tree?
Which combination opens NvimTree (the file explorer)?
Where is the default light/dark theme toggle?
options: An icon on the right of the Tabufline (click it)
questions.why: Click the theme icon at the right of the Tabufline.
